insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this GitLab instance (e.g., 'gitlab-acme-prod').

gitlab_url.title: Instance URL
gitlab_url.description: Base URL of the self-hosted GitLab instance (no trailing slash).

gitlab_token.title: Access Token
gitlab_token.description: GitLab Personal Access Token. Required scopes: read_api, read_repository, read_user.

gitlab_groups.title: Groups
gitlab_groups.description: Top-level group full paths to collect; subgroups and projects are discovered recursively. Leave empty to collect the entire instance (every project the token can access — requires an admin or broad service token for full coverage).

gitlab_projects.title: Additional Projects
gitlab_projects.description: Explicit project paths or numeric IDs to collect in addition to the configured groups.

gitlab_start_date.title: Start Date
gitlab_start_date.description: Start date for initial collection (YYYY-MM-DD). Commits and merge requests before this date are skipped on the first run.
